sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to make proud, puff up with pride, render insolent
2. to blind with pride or conceit, to render foolish or stupid
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of G5188; to envelop with smoke, that is, (figuratively) to inflate with self conceit: - high-minded, be lifted up with pride, be proud.
